rulings.Case Title: JOSEFINA PACUMIO VS. WELLS FARGO BANK N.A A BUSINESS ENTITY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 23, 2018, Line 1. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to cause of action for negligence is overruled. Demurrer to causes of action for UCL violation is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege loss of money or property caused by the unlawful, fraudulent or unfair practices. Demurrer to causes of action for violation of CCC 2923.6, 2923.7 and 12 CFR 1024.41(g) is sustained with leave to amend to allege damages caused by violations (as opposed to damages caused by default). Additionally, Plaintiff may allege facts showing that CC 2923.6 survived the repeal and/or allege a cause of action under CC 2924.11. All amendments shall be in bold font. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DWIGHT A. LUM ET AL VS. ZEPPELIN W. WONG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 23, 2018, Line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT MICHIKO MATSUMOTO'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT. Moot in light of the ruling on the Cross-Complainant's Motion for Leave to File First Amended and Supplemental Cross-Complaint. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DWIGHT A. LUM ET AL VS. ZEPPELIN W. WONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended And Supplemental Cross Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 23, 2018, Line 2. CROSS COMPLAINANT VELDA WONG'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended And Supplemental Cross Complaint. GRANTED. First Amended and Supplemental Cross-Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC VS. HALEY GONZABA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Delaware Lakewood Apartments Llc'S Notice Of Motion To Disqualify Defendant'S Attorney
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 23, 2018, Line 4. PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC'S Motion To Disqualify Defendant's Attorney. OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice and no valid proof of service on file, delivery of the motion to the messenger is not sufficient. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: FREEDOM WEST HOMES VS. BENNY JASPER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 23, 2018, Line 3. DEFENDANT BENNY JASPER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) allege all elements of cause of action for unlawful detainer, including a requisite relationship, e.g. landlord-tenant; licensor-licensee; employer-employee, etc. OR allege a valid basis for recovery of possession from an unauthorized occupant, e.g. ejectment, forcible detainer, etc.; (2) attach Attachment 15 referenced in paragraph 14 or remove the reference; (3) allege facts showing compliance with or exemption from SFRO - Plaintiff checked box 14 on the Form Complaint indicating applicability of a local rent control or eviction ordinance; (4) indicate number of pages attached in paragraph 18 of Form Complaint. =(501/CFH)
